products.name: Cable Management Clips (Pack of 20)
products.description: Adhesive-backed cable organizer clips for desks, TVs, and home offices. Holds USB, HDMI, and charging cables neatly.
products.sourcingNotes: Widely available at Dragon Mart Hall 2 in bulk. Also on Alibaba MOQ 100 pcs at ~0.80 USD each (~3 AED). Shipping from China ~0.5 AED/unit at 1kg+ orders.
products.whyFastMoving: Work-from-home boom in UAE. Consistently top seller on Amazon UAE electronics accessories. Repeat purchase item.
products.restrictions: None. Standard cable accessories — no Amazon restrictions.
products.shippingNote: Lightweight, under 500g per pack. Minimal shipping from China.

products.name: Magnetic Phone Car Mount (Dashboard / Air Vent)
products.description: Universal magnetic car phone holder. 360-degree rotation. Compatible with all smartphones. No charging interference.
products.sourcingNotes: Dragon Mart has these at 4-8 AED per unit depending on MOQ. Alibaba at ~1.5 USD (5.5 AED) with free shipping at 200+ units.
products.whyFastMoving: UAE has very high car ownership. Phone GPS usage is universal. One of the top-selling car accessories on Amazon UAE year-round.
products.shippingNote: Under 200g. Very low shipping cost. Fits in small poly mailer.

products.name: Microfiber Cleaning Cloths (10-Pack)
products.description: Multi-purpose ultra-soft microfiber cloths for screens, glasses, cars, and surfaces. Lint-free, reusable.
products.sourcingNotes: Deira textile market stocks microfiber rolls. Can be cut and packed to order. Alibaba bulk 0.5-1 USD per pack of 10. Minimal shipping weight.
products.whyFastMoving: Consumed regularly. UAE households have large families and multiple cars. Consistent Amazon UAE bestseller in cleaning supplies.
products.restrictions: None. Household cleaning accessory — no restrictions.
products.shippingNote: Very lightweight and compressible. Low shipping cost even from China.

products.name: Bamboo Laptop / Phone Stand
products.description: Foldable bamboo stand for laptops and tablets. Eco-friendly, lightweight, adjustable angle. Fits 9-15 inch devices.
products.sourcingNotes: Alibaba price ~3 USD (11 AED) including shipping at 50+ MOQ. Some local UAE craft suppliers in Al Quoz also stock eco accessories.
products.whyFastMoving: Remote work culture in UAE is strong. Eco-friendly products have growing demand. Amazon UAE sees consistent sales in this category.
products.shippingNote: Under 400g. Ships flat — fits in envelope-size box. Cheap to ship.

products.name: Silicone Cable Ties / Velcro Straps (Pack of 30)
products.description: Reusable silicone or velcro cable ties. Used for cables, bags, kitchen, travel. Multiple colors.
products.sourcingNotes: Dragon Mart stocks these at 1.5-3 AED per pack. Alibaba at 0.4-0.7 USD per pack for 100+ MOQ. Essentially no shipping cost per unit.
products.whyFastMoving: Universal use case. Used by everyone with cables. Low price point means high impulse-buy rate on Amazon.

products.name: LED Strip Lights (5m, USB-Powered, RGB)
products.description: USB-powered RGB LED strip with remote. For TVs, desks, bedrooms, gaming setups. Self-adhesive backing.
products.sourcingNotes: Dragon Mart Hall 1 electronics section has these at 12-18 AED. Alibaba 4 USD (14.7 AED) at 50+ MOQ with free shipping to UAE in bulk.
products.whyFastMoving: Huge demand from gamers and home decorators in UAE. Trending on TikTok/YouTube which drives Amazon searches. Repeat purchase category.
products.restrictions: Check Amazon listing — ensure USB-powered (not hardwired) to stay out of electrical goods restrictions.
products.shippingNote: Under 300g. Compact roll. Low shipping cost.

products.name: Reusable Silicone Food Storage Bags (Set of 5)
products.description: Leak-proof reusable silicone bags for food storage, snacks, freezer, sous vide. BPA-free. Sizes: small to gallon.
products.sourcingNotes: Alibaba price ~3.5 USD (12.9 AED) per set of 5 at 100 MOQ. UAE has no local supplier but AliExpress ships to UAE in 10-15 days at minimal cost for small quantities.
products.whyFastMoving: Eco-friendly alternative to plastic bags is trending in UAE. Popular with health-conscious households and expat families.
products.restrictions: Ensure food-grade silicone certification on listing. No oral use — it is storage only. Amazon allows this.
products.shippingNote: Flexible, compressible. Fits in small mailer under 200g.

products.name: Foldable Water Bottle (Silicone, 500ml)
products.description: Collapsible food-grade silicone water bottle. BPA-free. Ideal for travel, hiking, gym. UAE climate drives constant demand.
products.sourcingNotes: Alibaba ~2 USD (7.4 AED) per unit at 50+ MOQ. Shipping included in cost estimate. No local UAE supplier but fast shipping via sea freight in bulk.
products.whyFastMoving: UAE heat means constant hydration need. Travel is huge in UAE — residents travel frequently. Gym culture is strong. Trending on Amazon UAE.
products.restrictions: Food-grade silicone — Amazon UAE allows. Not oral (drinking vessel is fine, not supplement). Ensure BPA-free certification.
products.shippingNote: Folds flat to under 2cm. Very low dimensional weight. Minimal shipping cost.

products.name: Drawer Organizer Dividers (Set of 8, Expandable)
products.description: Expandable plastic or bamboo drawer organizer inserts. For kitchen, bathroom, office drawers. Adjustable width.
products.sourcingNotes: Dragon Mart household section at 8-14 AED per set. Alibaba 3 USD (11 AED) at 30 MOQ. Available locally in UAE for faster restocking.
products.whyFastMoving: Home organization products are consistently top-selling on Amazon UAE. Gifted frequently. Minimal competition from local stores on Amazon.
products.shippingNote: Lightweight plastic. Ships efficiently. Even local Dragon Mart sourcing eliminates shipping cost.

products.name: Portable Luggage Scale (Digital, up to 50kg)
products.description: Digital handheld luggage scale with backlit display. Up to 50kg capacity. Compact, battery-powered.
products.sourcingNotes: Dragon Mart electronics ~8-12 AED per unit. Alibaba ~2.5 USD (9.2 AED) at 50 MOQ. Very accessible locally.
products.whyFastMoving: UAE is a major travel hub. Millions of expats travel back home regularly. Airlines strict on luggage weight — this is a must-have. Consistent Amazon bestseller.
products.shippingNote: Under 150g. Ships in small box. Extremely low cost.

products.name: Waterproof Phone Pouch / Dry Bag
products.description: Universal waterproof phone pouch. Works with touchscreen. Neck lanyard included. For beach, pool, water sports.
products.sourcingNotes: Dragon Mart and local accessories shops at 3-6 AED. Alibaba 1.2 USD (4.4 AED) at 100 MOQ. Wide local availability.
products.whyFastMoving: UAE beach and pool culture is massive. Huge OFW and tourist segment. Sells all year due to UAE weather. Cheap enough for impulse purchase.
products.shippingNote: Under 100g. Envelope-size. Virtually no shipping cost.

products.name: Car Seat Gap Filler / Side Pocket Organizer (Pair)
products.description: Fills gap between car seat and console. Prevents items from falling. With phone pocket and cup holder. Fits most cars.
products.sourcingNotes: Dragon Mart automotive accessories section at 10-16 AED per pair. Alibaba ~3.5 USD (12.9 AED) at 50 MOQ.
products.whyFastMoving: Universal car problem. Very popular in the Gulf where people spend long hours in cars. Consistent Amazon UAE seller.
products.shippingNote: Padded item. Under 300g per pair. Low shipping.
